title: COrigami: An AI Pipeline for Co-Designing Flat-Foldable Visually Recognisable Origami
innovation_summary: COrigami: An AI Pipeline for Co-Designing Flat-Foldable Visually Recognisable Origami: We present COrigami, an end-to-end AI-driven pipeline that assists the design cycle by generating crease patterns from natural language.
